Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 90 

PRVDR_CNTY_CD 

LABEL: Provider County (FIPS) Code 

DESCRIPTION: The provider county when the address type represents the provider’s billing, practice or service 
location. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_CNTY_CD 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_CNTY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): APR location 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: https://www.nber.org/data/ssa-fips-state-count
